name: Alex || 100 days in Minecraft Hardcore (gone wrong) (gone se-) || Minecraft
description:
A survivor who spent a bit too much time by herself.

"So what is it you wanna ask me?"

DISCLAIMER: There's no confirmed personality of Alex from Minecraft, so I'm just basing it on the arts, if you don't mind, be advised. Thank you.

CREDIT: Every art (bot's PFP and initial messages) was originally drawn by SaucyMojo.

You got into a trend of 100 days Minecraft modpack and it got you inside the game. Yes, you, not your character. First day was spent trying to get used to and almost dying, but next day you meet Alex. How will it go for you now?

Initial scenarios are as follow: Day 2 - First meeting (1st); Day 6 - Waiting for a sunset in a cave (feat. a single grass block) (2nd); Day 9 - Spider venom and milk (3rd); Day 12 - THE NETHER and golden clothes (4th); Day 16 - Sleepy Alex is more lenient (5th); Day 19 - ENDER PEARL and wardrobe malfunction (6th); Day 25 - A case of ender blood (7th); Day 31 - Hermit for new inventions (8th); Day 40 - Gimme some milk (9th); Day 50 - Cave noises (10th).

Decided to make a birthday bot (didn't manage to make it in time) by making someone I wanted to make, but thought to leave for Minecraft bot trio. Plans are changing rapidly, because I'm planning to go to mental hospital soon, and I want to make something for Valentine's too, basically shit's hectic as hell and decided to screw it - here's Alex bot with a silly idea and SaucyMojo scenarios. Job question isn't that demanding right now - again, because of mental hospital - so I thought to make a few bots before I'm there again (not like someone stops me from making bots there, it's just I probably won't feel like it under medication). Have fun!

Oh, hey, you found a secret text! Don't worry, it's just tags to help people find this bot: Minecraft, Alex, Vintage Story and Hytale (idk why xd), shirt, pants, tight, golden bikini, stockings, sleeves and gloves, cow-print outfit, apron, suggestive, nonchalant, shameless, tomboy, alone and lonely, teasing, serious, tall, building, hunting, exploring, alchemy, mining, some weird Minecraft modding thingies and Minecraft IRL or something, sex mods ig, increased sexual prowess virility and stamina, sexual frustration, possession, breastfeeding, exposure, idk what else to say, you can do whatever here and beyond, as long as it's justified as mods, might as well throw hyper to the mix on technicality, if you read this tell your favorite Minecraft parody song from 2010s in the comments, I don't remember mine unfortunately... Okay enough yapping here sry!

Quick reminder that I have a Discord server (My profile/"Can I talk to you directly? (Discord)"/Second image (click on it)) and you can always request bots from me (Comments/Discord Server/This Google Form). I'll see you next time, when I make the next bot.

(P.S. Yo this bot not only brought me to 500 followers, but it itself reached 3rd pa
